Perfect! I have successfully completed the renaming task. Here's a summary of the changes made to `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/core/commit_message_generator.py`:
## Changes Made
All 4 occurrences of `PlanContext` have been renamed to `PrContext`:
1. **Line 25** - TYPE_CHECKING import: - Changed: `from erk.core.plan_context_provider import PlanContext` - To: `from erk.core.plan_context_provider import PrContext`
2. **Line 50** - CommitMessageRequest dataclass field: - Changed: `plan_context: PlanContext | None` - To: `plan_context: PrContext | None`
3. **Line 205** - `_build_context_section` method parameter: - Changed: `plan_context: PlanContext | None,` - To: `plan_context: PrContext | None,`
4. **Line 257** - `_build_user_prompt` method parameter: - Changed: `plan_context: PlanContext | None,` - To: `plan_context: PrContext | None,`
All renames were applied precisely as requested. The class name `PlanContextProvider`, variable names, method names, and the module path `plan_context_provider` were left unchanged as instructed.
